creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Tue Sep 10 14:38:14 2013
New Revision: 326905
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/326905

Log:
  www/mitmproxy: update to 0.9.2
  
  - Update to 0.9.2
  
  Changes: https://github.com/mitmproxy/mitmproxy/blob/v0.9.2/CHANGELOG

  Submitted by:	Hung-Yi Chen <gaod hychen.org> (maintainer)

Modified:

  head/www/mitmproxy/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/mitmproxy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/mitmproxy/Makefile	Tue Sep 10 14:35:48 2013	(r326904)
+++ head/www/mitmproxy/Makefile	Tue Sep 10 14:38:14 2013	(r326905)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	mitmproxy
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.2
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://mitmproxy.org/download/

==============================================================================
